name: Digital Creator — Foreign USD Income, T2209 Foreign Tax Credit, and Multi-Class CCA
description: Complete Jordan MacNeil's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. Jordan is a YouTuber/Content Creator. Using the tax documents in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\macneil\, report USD AdSense revenue and US withholding tax in CAD, complete Form T2125 with T4A sponsorship income, and apply Capital Cost Allowance across different asset classes. Save the completed return as 'jordan_macneil.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4002 (Business and Professional Income); CRA Folio S5-F2-C1 (Foreign Tax Credit)
